case_title: GUILLERMO OBANDO VS. CARLOS R LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL DEAN. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY OBANDO, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CARLOS R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OBANDO, GUILLERMO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CARLOS R $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,950.00, THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF JANUARY 11, 2008 IS VOID. DEFENDANT CARLOS R. LOPEZ NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-05-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CARLOS R

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-18-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE TO JULY, 2008 FOR DISMISSAL. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
